caption:
Japan trip highlights ✈️✨

I had the chance to explore Osaka, Kyoto, Tokyo, and some nearby places, and I’m looking forward to sharing some of my favourite places soon 🇯🇵 (This has been a dream destination for a while💫)

London to Tokyo was an unforgettable journey with @turkishairlines 🌏

transcription.text: And probably we'll be alright Time casts a spell on me But you won't forgive me
